creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
There is both a language directory and a languages directory.
	The language directory only contains g77, and is not in the
	INDEX file, which implies that it was missed in some kind of
	conversion.

Fix: 

Move g77 to languages instead of language (and insert it in the
	INDEX database?...)
How-To-Repeat: 
	
	ls /usr/packages
